questions.question: List all records from the users table.
questions.explanation: SELECT * returns all columns and rows.

questions.question: Find all users where email is NULL.
questions.answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email IS NULL;
questions.explanation: IS NULL checks for NULL values.

questions.question: List all products ordered by price from highest to lowest.
questions.answer: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC;

questions.question: Show orders with customer names.
questions.answer: SELECT o.*, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id;

questions.question: Count orders per user.
questions.answer: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY user_id;
